profile.name: Tobiloba Awolaju
profile.title: Web3 Developer (Game + AI) | TypeScript + Solidity + Godot + AI Agents
profile.bio:
I am a Full-Stack Web3 Developer who ships complete products end-to-end—from 3D modeling and digital art to smart contracts and deployment.

I specialize in blockchain infrastructure, EVM/Monad smart contracts, and AI agents. Currently, I am the solo builder behind World of Nads, a live 20-player real-time Web3 multiplayer game. I successfully built and shipped the MVP entirely from scratch, handling all game architecture, on-chain prize payouts, and visual assets.

My Current Objective:
I am a Systems-focused Product Engineer looking to contribute to high-performance Web3 infrastructure or Agentic AI teams. I bring a relentless builder mentality and a proven track record of shipping end-to-end production code, from EVM indexing engines to real-time multiplayer games.

projects.title: World of Nads ↗
projects.description: Browser-based competitive arena game with hybrid web2/web3 architecture on Monad. 20-player King of the Hill matches with on-chain prize payouts.

writeup.overview: Built a complete Web3 game from scratch — all art, modeling, smart contracts, and deployment solo.
features: Integrate blockchain for on-chain prize payouts
Seamless Web3 onboarding with embedded wallets
writeup.architecture: Godot → WASM + React/Vite frontend, Node.js WebSocket server @20Hz, Firebase RTDB + PostgreSQL, Monad smart contracts.
writeup.techStack: Godot Engine, TypeScript, React, Node.js, Solidity, Monad, Firebase, PostgreSQL
writeup.web3: Real-time state sync with 20Hz WebSocket server, Privy embedded wallets for user authentication. EVM & Monad integration.
writeup.challenges: Real-time multiplayer sync, blockchain integration, creating all art solo
writeup.outcomes: Live game with real users, on-chain prize distribution working. Built full-stack product from concept to deployment.
writeup.future: More game modes, expanded blockchain features

projects.title: Noogler - Embodied AI Agent ↗
projects.description: Closed-loop embodied AI agent that operates computers like a human — sees screen, controls mouse/keyboard, autonomously completes tasks.

writeup.overview: Build an AI agent that can operate computers like a human — seeing screens, navigating interfaces, completing complex tasks autonomously.
features: Integrate Gemini 2.0 Live API for reasoning
writeup.architecture: Cloud backend (Node.js) + Gemini 2.0 API, Svelte frontend, Rust local agent for Windows automation.
writeup.infrastructure: Local Windows machine with screen capture capabilities
writeup.techStack: Svelte, Node.js, Rust, Google Gemini 2.0, Firebase
writeup.challenges: Real-time screen capture, reliable input simulation, handling diverse applications
writeup.outcomes: Can open software, navigate interfaces, fix errors autonomously. Works in browsers, IDEs, Excel, games. Great integration of LLMs with real-world computer control.
writeup.future: More robust automation, broader application support. Advanced Gemini Live & Windows Automation API integrations.
